results.title: Vercel
results.description: Vercel's Frontend Cloud provides the infrastructure and developer experience to build, scale, and secure a faster, more personalized web.

results.title: Vercel BotID
results.description: A minimal Next.js application that utilizes Vercel BotID to protect routes from advanced bots, demonstrating how to implement bot protection in your Next.js app.

results.title: Vercel Examples
results.description: A collection of demos, starter applications, and best practices for building and deploying projects with Vercel.

results.title: Vercel Storage
results.description: Vercel Storage provides a suite of tools for managing databases, key-value stores, object storage, and edge configuration for applications.

results.title: Vercel Documentation
results.description: Vercel is the AI Cloud, a unified platform for building, deploying, and scaling AI-powered applications and agentic workloads, as well as modern web applications.

results.title: Vercel Terraform Provider
results.description: The Vercel Terraform Provider allows users to manage and automate Vercel resources, such as projects, deployments, and domains, using Terraform configuration files.

results.title: Vercel SDK
results.description: A type-safe TypeScript SDK providing full control over the Vercel platform via the Vercel REST API.

results.title: Live Preview
results.description: A VS Code extension that hosts a local server to preview web projects, offering embedded and external browser previews, live refreshing, and debugging capabilities.

results.title: Vercel (llmstxt)
results.description: Vercel is an end-to-end platform for developers to create and deploy web applications, supporting a wide range of frameworks and offering features for collaboration, domain management, and production readiness.

results.title: Vercel Platforms
results.description: A production-ready example of a multi-tenant application built with Next.js 15, featuring custom subdomains for each tenant, tenant-specific content, and Redis for data storage.

results.title: Vercel REST API Reference
results.description: The Vercel REST API provides programmatic access to manage Vercel projects, deployments, domains, and other resources.

results.title: Vercel
results.description: Vercel documentation.

results.title: Vercel Sandbox
results.description: Vercel Sandbox allows you to run arbitrary code in isolated, ephemeral Linux VMs, powered by Firecracker MicroVMs and Vercel's build infrastructure.

results.title: Microsoft Defender for Cloud
results.description: Microsoft Defender for Cloud offers unified security management and advanced threat protection for hybrid cloud workloads, focusing on posture management, compliance, and threat response.

results.title: Hazel
results.description: Hazel is an update server for Electron applications that simplifies deployment and provides fast, lightweight updates by leveraging GitHub Releases and Vercel Serverless Functions.

results.title: Fun
results.description: Vercel Fun is a local development runtime for serverless functions, closely mimicking the AWS Lambda environment for easier testing and debugging.

results.title: Safe Deployments
results.description: A collection of Safe singleton deployments

results.title: Mermaid Preview VS Code
results.description: A Visual Studio Code extension that provides real-time preview, syntax highlighting, pan & zoom, and export capabilities for Mermaid diagrams.

results.title: Vercel
results.description: Vercel documentation.

results.title: Shadcn Cal.com
results.description: A Next.js project bootstrapped with create-next-app, featuring optimized font loading and deployment on Vercel.

results.title: Planning Domain Description Language Support
results.description: A VS Code extension that provides comprehensive support for the Planning Domain Definition Language (PDDL), enhancing the editor for domain modeling, validation, solution industrialization, and plan validation.

results.title: Cloudflare VLESS Trojan
results.description: A Cloudflare Workers/Pages proxy script supporting VLESS and Trojan protocols with WS+TLS, offering easy local deployment and flexible node configuration.

results.title: Temporal Vercel AI SDK Demo
results.description: A demonstration project showcasing the integration of Temporal workflows with Vercel's AI SDK for building AI-powered applications.

results.title: Onyx
results.description: NextJS 14 + Supabase SSR Auth & PostgreSQL DB + Shadcn-UI + TanStack React Query + Rust runtime serverless API ready + React Hook Form + Zod + 'A' Security Headers Score + RBAC + Resend + CRUD operations + admin dashboard + OpenAI playground, and more. Deploy on Vercel and get your scalable MVP running in days.

results.title: Varlock
results.description: Varlock enables declarative schema for .env files using @env-spec comments, offering validation, type safety, sensitive value protection, and flexible multi-environment management.

results.title: OpenZeppelin Defender
results.description: Security Management to Protect the Open Economy

results.title: AmneziaWG Go
results.description: AmneziaWG Go is a Go implementation of the WireGuard protocol, offering enhanced protection against Deep Packet Inspection (DPI) by blending traffic with regular internet data while maintaining high performance.

results.title: Damn Vulnerable DeFi
results.description: The smart contract security training ground for developers, security researchers and educators.

results.title: Vertex
results.description: Vertex is a decentralized exchange (DEX) that combines CEX-level speed with on-chain security, enabling spot and perpetual trading across multiple chains with unified liquidity via a hybrid orderbook.

results.title: Vercel Edge Runtime
results.description: The Vercel Edge Runtime is a JavaScript runtime environment optimized for edge computing, enabling fast and efficient execution of serverless functions.
